name: Black Forest Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium-size bowl, combine 3/4 cup of the sugar, flour, three tablespoons of the cocoa, baking powder and salt. Blend in melted butter and vanilla; beat until smooth.
3. Spread batter into an 8 inch square pan.
4. In a small bowl, combine remaining 1/2 cup sugar, brown sugar and remaining 1/4 cup cocoa. Sprinkle mixture evenly over batter.
5. Combine hot water and almond extract; pour over batter without stirring.
6. Bake for 40 minutes, or until center is almost set. Let stand 15 minutes.
7. Transfer to dessert dishes and spoon pudding from bottom of pan over cake.
8. Serve with cherry pie filling as sauce (or enjoy it plain or with whipped cream).
